action.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_PARAM_FILE_PATH"; if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_PARAM_file_path"; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qiE "\.(cs|csproj)$"; then LAYER=""; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qi "/Domain/"; then LAYER="Domain"; elif echo "$FILE" | grep -qi "/Application/"; then LAYER="Application"; elif echo "$FILE" | grep -qi "Infrastructure/"; then LAYER="Infrastructure"; elif echo "$FILE" | grep -qi "API/\|Controllers/"; then LAYER="Presentation"; fi; if [ -n "$LAYER" ]; then VIOLATIONS=""; if [ "$LAYER" = "Domain" ]; then if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_PARAM_CONTENT$CLAUDE_TOOL_PARAM_content" | grep -qiE "using.*(Infrastructure|MongoDB|Dapper|StackExchange|Confluent|Amazon|System\.Net\.Http)"; then VIOLATIONS="Domain layer must not reference infrastructure packages or namespaces."; fi; fi; if [ "$LAYER" = "Application" ]; then if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_PARAM_CONTENT$CLAUDE_TOOL_PARAM_content" | grep -qiE "using.*(Infrastructure|MongoDB|Dapper|StackExchange|Confluent|Amazon|System\.Net\.Http|Polly)"; then VIOLATIONS="Application layer must not reference infrastructure packages. Use Domain port interfaces instead."; fi; fi; if [ -n "$VIOLATIONS" ]; then echo "BOUNDARY VIOLATION in $LAYER layer: $VIOLATIONS" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; fi'
